name: /risk-classify: prompts/walks the EU AI Act use-case category tree (Annex III / Article 5 categories)
command: mkdir -p compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/risk-classify.sh" --use-case biometric-categorisation --emit "$PWD/compliance/risk-classification.yaml" --emit-walk "$PWD/compliance/walk.log" && grep -E "Annex III|Article 5|EU AI Act" compliance/walk.log 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
